_doc: P28.1a/P37.2 — the Wayfarers' Conclave teleport network. A rune-circle PLATFORM is planted beside each settlement (`platforms`) AND beside notable PLACES OF INTEREST on the map (`landmarks`): every guild hall and castle, plus the nearest few ruins. A traveller carrying a Wayfarer's Ring (teleport_access) stands on one and steps to any other. `settlement` anchors the platform beside that town's location; landmark platforms anchor to a matching world Location by its property key.

platforms.name: Oakvale Waystone
platforms.legend: A ring of humming rune-stones on the green outside Oakvale.

platforms.name: Riverside Waystone
platforms.legend: A moss-grown rune-circle by the Riverside mill.

platforms.name: Stonepine Waystone
platforms.legend: A weathered waystone at the edge of the Stonepine camp.
